message:
perf(visual-fx): hoist sunset-fast-path branch out of per-pixel loop

Move the use_sunset_fast_path conditional check from inside the inner
pixel loop to outside the entire quality-level loop in the plasma
renderer. Each FxQuality arm (Full, Reduced, Minimal) is now split into
two fully specialized loop bodies -- one for the sunset fast path and one
for the generic palette -- eliminating a branch-per-pixel at the cost of
some code duplication. This is a pure performance optimization with no
behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
